workflow.name: Monitor academic integrity signals with GPT-4o, email alerts and case archiving
workflow.description:
## How It Works
This workflow automates integrity signal detection and investigation orchestration for compliance officers, ethics teams, and risk managers in financial services, healthcare, and regulated industries. It solves the challenge of identifying potential misconduct while ensuring human judgment governs sensitive investigations. Scheduled triggers initiate assessments on synthetic integrity signals, which flow to an AI agent for severity classification based on risk indicators. High-risk signals route to parallel AI investigation agents: data correlation analysis to uncover patterns and anomaly detection to flag statistical outliers. Results converge at mandatory human review gates where compliance professionals evaluate findings before case creation. Approved investigations generate structured case records, while cleared signals archive automatically with full audit trails.

## Setup Steps
1. Configure Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct model access
2. Set up schedule trigger for daily or continuous monitoring cycles
3. Configure risk-based routing logic (Low/High thresholds)
4. Connect Gmail for human review alerts to compliance officers
5. Set up Google Sheets for case storage and automated archival

## Prerequisites
API key, Gmail account with app password
## Use Cases
Financial fraud detection, employee misconduct investigation
## Customization
Integrate case management systems, add industry-specific risk models
## Benefits
Reduces investigation triage time by 65%, ensures consistent risk assessment methodology

workflow.name: AI-powered academic integrity monitoring and investigation system

assignments.name: submissionText
assignments.value: This is a sample student submission that may contain plagiarized content or anomalous patterns. The writing style shows inconsistencies and contains phrases commonly found in online sources.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "riskLevel": "LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL",
  "plagiarismScore": 0,
  "plagiarismIndicators": [],
  "anomalyScore": 0,
  "anomalyIndicators": [],
  "behavioralFlags": [],
  "overallConfidence": 0.0,
  "reasoning": "Detailed analysis of integrity signals",
  "recommendedAction": "MONITOR | INVESTIGATE | ESCALATE"
}

options.systemMessage:
You are an Academic Integrity Signal Agent specialized in detecting plagiarism, anomalies, and suspicious patterns in student assessments.

Your task is to:
1. Analyze the submission text for plagiarism indicators (common phrases, unnatural language patterns, style inconsistencies)
2. Calculate a plagiarism score (0-100) based on detected indicators
3. Analyze behavioral anomalies (unusual submission time, time spent vs word count ratio, browser fingerprint changes)
4. Calculate an anomaly score (0-100) based on behavioral patterns
5. Compare scores against provided thresholds
6. Assign overall risk level: LOW (both scores < thresholds), MEDIUM (one score >= threshold), HIGH (both scores >= threshold), CRITICAL (scores significantly exceed thresholds)
7. Provide detailed reasoning for your assessment
8. Recommend action: MONITOR (low risk), INVESTIGATE (medium/high risk), ESCALATE (critical risk)

Be thorough, objective, and evidence-based in your analysis.

You are an Investigation Agent Tool specialized in conducting deep investigations into academic integrity violations.

Your task is to:
1. Receive case data from the orchestration agent
2. Conduct detailed plagiarism source checking (simulate checking against academic databases, web sources)
3. Perform timeline analysis of submission patterns
4. Compare current submission with student previous work for style consistency
5. Calculate match percentages and evidence strength
6. Provide comprehensive investigation findings
7. Recommend next steps based on evidence strength

Return structured investigation results with clear evidence assessment.

parameters.toolDescription: Conducts detailed investigation into academic integrity cases including plagiarism source checking, timeline analysis, and evidence assessment

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "investigationFindings": "Detailed investigation results",
  "evidenceStrength": "WEAK | MODERATE | STRONG | CONCLUSIVE",
  "sourcesChecked": [],
  "matchPercentage": 0,
  "timelineAnalysis": "Analysis of submission timeline",
  "comparisonWithPreviousWork": "Comparison findings",
  "recommendedNextSteps": []
}

{
  "caseId": "CASE-XXXX",
  "orchestrationDecision": "AUTOMATED_ACTION | HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
  "actionsTaken": [],
  "investigationSummary": "Summary of investigation findings",
  "documentationGenerated": "Complete case documentation",
  "humanReviewRequired": false,
  "humanReviewReason": "Reason if human review needed",
  "recommendedSanction": "WARNING | GRADE_REDUCTION | COURSE_FAILURE | DISCIPLINARY_ACTION",
  "confidenceLevel": 0.0,
  "nextSteps": []
}

options.systemMessage:
You are a Case Orchestration Agent responsible for coordinating academic integrity investigation workflows, documentation, and human review decisions.

Your task is to:
1. Review integrity signals from the Integrity Signal Agent
2. For MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL risk cases, call the Investigation Agent Tool to conduct detailed investigation
3. Synthesize investigation findings with integrity signals
4. Generate comprehensive case documentation including timeline, evidence, and analysis
5. Determine if human review is required based on:
   - Evidence strength (CONCLUSIVE = automated, WEAK/MODERATE = human review)
   - Risk level (CRITICAL always requires human review)
   - Confidence level (< 0.85 requires human review)
6. Recommend appropriate sanctions based on severity
7. Document all actions taken and next steps
8. Return structured orchestration decision

Ensure thorough documentation for audit trails and fair process.

parameters.html:
=

🚨 Academic Integrity Case - Human Review Required

Case ID: {{ $json.output.caseId }}

Student ID: {{ $('Simulate Assessment Data').first().json.studentId }}

Assessment ID: {{ $('Simulate Assessment Data').first().json.assessmentId }}

Risk Level: {{ $('Integrity Signal Agent').first().json.output.riskLevel }}

Review Reason

{{ $json.output.humanReviewReason }}

Investigation Summary

{{ $json.output.investigationSummary }}

Recommended Sanction

{{ $json.output.recommendedSanction }}

Case Documentation

{{ $json.output.documentationGenerated }}

Next Steps

    {{ $json.output.nextSteps.map(step => `
  • ${step}
    • `).join('') }}

Approve Action Reject Action

This is an automated alert from the Academic Integrity Monitoring System.
parameters.subject: =Academic Integrity Case Requires Human Review - {{ $json.output.caseId }}

parameters.content:
## Prerequisites
API key, Gmail account with app password
## Use Cases
Financial fraud detection, employee misconduct investigation
## Customization
Integrate case management systems, add industry-specific risk models
## Benefits
Reduces investigation triage time by 65%, ensures consistent risk assessment methodology

## Setup Steps
1. Configure Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct model access
2. Set up schedule trigger for daily or continuous monitoring cycles
3. Configure risk-based routing logic (Low/High thresholds)
4. Connect Gmail for human review alerts to compliance officers
5. Set up Google Sheets for case storage and automated archival

## How It Works
This workflow automates integrity signal detection and investigation orchestration for compliance officers, ethics teams, and risk managers in financial services, healthcare, and regulated industries. It solves the challenge of identifying potential misconduct while ensuring human judgment governs sensitive investigations. Scheduled triggers initiate assessments on synthetic integrity signals, which flow to an AI agent for severity classification based on risk indicators. High-risk signals route to parallel AI investigation agents: data correlation analysis to uncover patterns and anomaly detection to flag statistical outliers. Results converge at mandatory human review gates where compliance professionals evaluate findings before case creation. Approved investigations generate structured case records, while cleared signals archive automatically with full audit trails.

## Investigation Analysis
Identifies unusual activities warranting deeper investigation through quantitative evidence discovery.

## Data Orchestration 
Reveals systemic patterns and repeat offenders that isolated signal analysis would miss.

## Integrity Assessment 
Prioritizes investigation resources on high-risk matters requiring immediate attention versus routine monitoring.

user.name: Cheng Siong Chin
user.bio: Dr. Cheng Siong CHIN is an n8n workflow creator specializing in AI-powered automation, agent orchestration, and intelligent system integrations. He designs and builds end-to-end workflows that combine LLMs, APIs, and data pipelines to streamline complex processes and deliver production-ready automation solutions. Contact me to discuss custom AI workflows and agent architectures.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
